data.title: Milestone Pharmaceuticals Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Update on the Commercial Launch of CARDAMYST™ (etripamil) Nasal Spray for the Treatment of PSVT
data.description: In March 20, 2026, Milestone® Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: MIST) disclosed its financial performance for the last quarter and full year closing on December 31, 2025. The company, headquartered in Montreal and Charlotte, N.C., specializes in developing and marketing groundbreaking cardiovascular drugs. A significant highlight was the approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for CARDAMYST™ (etripamil) nasal spray. This approval allows for the conversion of acute symptomatic episodes of paroxysmal supraventricular tachycardia (PSVT) to sinus rhythm in adults. Additionally, the company launched the product during this transformative year.

data.title: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich Hosts 29th Annual Dallas Cosmetic Surgery and Medicine Meeting Now Underway in Dallas
data.description: The 29th Annual Dallas Cosmetic Surgery and Medicine Meeting for 2026 is currently taking place in Dallas, showcasing international developments in cosmetic surgery, technology, and patient safety. Leading plastic surgeon and educator, Dr. Rod J. Rohrich, is spearheading the event.

data.title: Arch Biopartners Announces St. Michael’s Hospital Commences Patient Dosing in the Phase II CS-AKI Trial of LSALT Peptide
data.description: Today, Arch Biopartners Inc. revealed that St. Michael’s Hospital, a part of Unity Health Toronto, has initiated patient dosing in Arch’s Phase II clinical trial assessing LSALT peptide for preventing and treating cardiac surgery-associated acute kidney injury (CS-AKI). The trial is aimed at investigating the effectiveness of LSALT peptide in addressing CS-AKI, a significant complication following cardiac surgery. Arch, listed on TSX Venture as ARCH and on OTCQB as ACHFF, shared this development, underscoring the progress in their research efforts. This news signifies a pivotal step forward in the efforts to combat CS-AKI and improve patient outcomes in cardiac surgery.

data.title: Kayhan Space Opens Satellite Intelligence to Investors and Financial Professionals for the First Time
data.description: A new AI-powered Satcat Terminal has been unveiled by Kayhan in Denver, offering real-time satellite and orbital information to investors, insurers, and enterprises. This advanced technology aims to provide crucial data efficiently and accurately to its users.

data.title: ELIJA Foundation to Host "Pathway to Adulthood: Using Self-Direction - Transitioning for Independence in 2026" "What Happens to Our Children When We Die? Conference in Bethpage
data.description: Bethpage, New York - On March 20, 2026, the ELIJA Foundation announced their upcoming event, the annual Pathway to Adulthood conference. Scheduled for Saturday, March 21, 2026, the event will focus on the theme of "Using Self-Direction – Transitioning for Independence." The conference aims to provide valuable insights and guidance for individuals in the autism community. This full-day event promises to offer a wealth of information and support, attracting a significant number of attendees.

data.title: Ermenegildo Zegna Group Reports Full Year 2025 Profit of €109 Million, up 20% YoY, With a Cash Surplus of €52 Million
data.description: Milan-based Ermenegildo Zegna N.V. (NYSE: ZGN) reported a Profit of €109.5 million for Fiscal Year 2025, marking a 20% increase from the previous year's €90.9 million. The Adjusted EBIT for FY 2025 stood at €163.0 million (€173.0 million prior to a €10 million provision for expected losses on trade receivables linked to Saks Global), down from €184.0 million in FY 2024. The company noted strong financial performance despite facing challenges.

data.title: MyOme Demonstrates Clinical Validity of Integrated Polygenic and Clinical Risk Prediction for Coronary Artery Disease
data.description: A recent study conducted by MyOme in Menlo Park, California has highlighted the importance of incorporating polygenic risk scores in assessing the risk of atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease (ASCVD). This comes at a time when ACC/AHA guidelines have acknowledged the role of polygenic risk in enhancing ASCVD risk assessment. The research revealed the significance of combining polygenic scores with existing risk models for a more comprehensive evaluation. These findings were shared by MyOme, known for its expertise in clinical whole-genome analysis and integrated risk modeling. The study, released on March 20, 2026, emphasizes the potential of polygenic risk scores in improving the accuracy of ASCVD risk prediction. This development underscores the growing recognition of polygenic factors in shaping individual susceptibility to cardiovascular diseases.

data.title: GOTRAX Inspires the Electric Vehicle Revolution at the 2026 SXSW Emerging Tech Expo
data.description: The Emerging Tech Expo took place at the Fairmont Hotel in Austin, Texas, to honor innovators and companies influencing the future. The event featured industry leaders such as GOTRAX in the electric vehicle sector. The Expo, held on March 20, 2026, showcased cutting-edge technologies and projects shaping tomorrow's world.
